key_evidence: Pfizer led 2026 US drug price increases — 80 products raised, more than any other pharma company; Comirnaty +15%, Paxlovid and Ibrance also raised.
Senate Democrat report: 350+ medicines raised across 16 MFN deal signatories, contradicting Trump administration pricing agreement.
Public Citizen FOIA lawsuit April 2026 over Trump MFN deals with Pfizer and Lilly — external transparency pressure.
Washington State drug-pricing law signed March 2026; pharma giants (Novartis/AbbVie) sued — Pfizer requested veto but not a plaintiff. Sector boundary event.
Patient-assistance infrastructure (RxPathways, PAP Connect, USG PAP for Paxlovid through Dec 2026) remains substantive and prevents deeper downgrade.
